XenotypeDef.label: replicant
XenotypeDef.description:
Replicants are a mass produced clone strain, engineered as a cheap labor solution across the Rim. Physically robust, resistant to disease, and cheap to grow, they were designed to fill the roles nobody else wanted. Heavy labor, hazardous construction, and dangerous colonial work are their inheritance.

Their rapid growth matrix produces a body that is tough and resilient but carries a hidden cost. The cell replication machinery that builds them so efficiently begins to fail from within, accumulating damage that no medicine can address and no surgery can reach. The body runs fast. Eventually it runs out.

Dead to psychic influence and prone to sudden aggression, they struggle to integrate with unmodified humans. Most labor contractors consider this acceptable. They are rarely asked.

In their final years something changes. The failing mind opens briefly into something extraordinary. Whatever time remains is lived in full.
XenotypeDef.descriptionShort: A mass produced clone strain used as cheap labor across the Rim. Physically tough and disease resistant, built to work hard and die young.
